Female Horoscope 6703
In this chart, since the combination of Jupiter+ Mercury + Mars
is present she will be well versed in subject matters. She is likely
to undergo an operation since the combination of Mars + mercury
+Jupiter exists in East (Aries) and combination of Venus+ Rahu
exists in west (Gemini). The planetary combination ofMars +
Jupiter indicates blood pressure. Since Venus is posited in the
